title: Adjudication / retraction / supersession event (training-data-plan.md §3.1, §4, §5)
description: Append-only correction. Events are never mutated; an incorrect one is corrected by THIS event. Points at the corrected event via envelope.supersedes (a CORRECTION edge, never caused_by — the execution-causality DAG is unaffected). rationale is always required; when reproducible=true an artifact_id that exists on disk is required (mirrors the MCP report(update_finding) adjudication contract).

target_event_id.description: The event being corrected/adjudicated (also listed in envelope.supersedes for retraction/supersession).

allOf.$comment: reproducible=true demands a proving artifact_id (§4 adjudication contract).
